[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: Two stylized, human-like figures wearing animal-like skull masks and futuristic outfits stand facing each other inside a sci-fi game-like environment with UI elements along the bottom.

Main Subject:
On the left, a shirtless, muscular-looking figure wears a wide straw hat and a skull-shaped face mask with an ornate, black-and-white design, plus light-colored pants. On the right, another human-like figure wears a dark face covering and black mask/face area, with white hair tied back or swept to the side, and a tight black suit with bright pink, branching line patterns; the right figure’s arms are slightly raised as if gesturing.

Setting:
The scene appears indoors in a futuristic corridor or hangar, with metallic walls, glowing ceiling lights, and rectangular panels. In the distance behind the figures, a window-like or opening area shows a city-like or crowd-like backdrop with fireworks or bright sparks. The overall lighting is bright and game-like, with cool blue tones in the environment and vivid neon highlights on the characters.

Visual Details:
The left character stands with feet apart and arms relaxed at their sides. The right character faces forward and slightly toward the left character, with one hand angled near the left character’s direction. Both figures are rendered with smooth, stylized textures and sharp outlines. The environment includes ceiling lights and wall-mounted circular icons with cloud and arrow-like symbols, and there are rank/score-style icons near the top edge. The bottom edge includes a UI area with dark panels, small speaker and microphone icons, and short player name text in white over dark backgrounds.

Visible Text:
urfvraffz
qiëyÿ1st

Practical Summary:
The image shows two masked, stylized characters in futuristic clothing standing in a high-tech indoor setting. Game-like interface elements and player name text appear along the bottom of the screen.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
